title: ErrorCode Property, Spel Class
syntax:
ReadOnly Property ErrorCode As Integer

Type

Integer
description: Returns the current Controller error code.
see_also:
EStopOn

SafetyOn

ErrorCode Example

VB Example:

If m_spel.ErrorOn Then

    lblErrorCode.Text = m_spel.ErrorCode.ToString()

Else

    lblErrorCode.Text = ""

End If

C# Example:

if (m_spel.ErrorOn)

    lblErrorCode.Text = m_spel.ErrorCode.ToString();

else

    lblErrorCode.Text = "";
examples:
If m_spel.ErrorOn Then
    lblErrorCode.Text = m_spel.ErrorCode.ToString()
Else
    lblErrorCode.Text = ""
End If
